name: SOAR Sync
description: Forwards private channel events (messages, membership changes) to Torq via HTTP webhook for SOAR ingestion.

settings_schema.header: Configure where private channel events are sent for SOAR ingestion.

settings.help_text: The Torq webhook trigger URL events will be POSTed to.
Shared secret sent as X-Webhook-Secret header. Configure the matching value as a condition in your Torq webhook trigger.
If enabled, events from every private channel are forwarded. If disabled, only channels listed below are forwarded.
Only used when 'Sync all private channels' is disabled. Comma-separated list of channel IDs to forward events for.
If disabled, only metadata (channel, user, post ID, timestamp) is sent — not the message text. Recommended off unless your SOAR use case requires content inspection.
